name: Homemade Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on a large baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally to ensure even browning.
4. Reduce the temperature to 300 degrees Fahrenheit or 325 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking until the granola is browned and fairly dry.
5. Allow the granola to cool completely before storing it in a covered container at room temperature.
